Class AnalyticsCacheService

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.AnalyticsCacheService
@Service public class AnalyticsCacheService extends Object
Session-scoped in-memory cache for analytics DoublyLinkedList datasets.

Loads the full list once per session key, stores it here, and returns the cached version on subsequent calls. The cache lives for the lifetime of the Spring application context (one user session), so it never goes stale between page navigations within the same login.

Cache invalidation:

  • Call invalidate(String) or invalidateAll() after any operation that changes playback history (after a new song is played).

Time Complexity: O(1) amortized per get/put (HashMap).

Space Complexity: O(n) where n = total cached items across all keys.

    Method
    Description
    <T> DoublyLinkedList<T>

    Returns the cached list for key, or loads it via loader on a cache miss, stores it, and returns the result.
    void
    invalidate(String key)
    Removes a single key from the cache.
    void
    invalidateAll()
    Clears the entire cache.

  • Constructor Details

    • AnalyticsCacheService

      public AnalyticsCacheService()

  • Method Details

    • getOrLoad

      public <T> DoublyLinkedList<T> getOrLoad(String key, Supplier<DoublyLinkedList<T>> loader)
      Returns the cached list for key, or loads it via loader on a cache miss, stores it, and returns the result.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Element type stored in the list
      Parameters:
      key - Cache key (e.g. "history", "topSongs", "topAlbums", "topArtists")
      loader - Supplier that builds the full list — only called on a miss
      Returns:
      The cached (or freshly loaded) DoublyLinkedList Time Complexity : O(1) on hit; O(n) on miss (delegated to loader) Space Complexity: O(n) on miss

    • invalidate

      public void invalidate(String key)
      Removes a single key from the cache. The next call to getOrLoad(String, Supplier) for this key will re-fetch from the DB.
      Parameters:
      key - Cache key to evict

    • invalidateAll

      public void invalidateAll()
      Clears the entire cache. Call this after a bulk import or after the user logs out.
